description: Tristan Frizza discusses Zeta Markets' vision for a decentralized trading platform, highlighting infrastructure improvements for Solana DeFi and the growth in total value locked (TVL) and derivatives volume. He introduces Bullet, Solana's first real-time L2 solution aimed at enhancing performance and user experience.
topic_summary: Tristan Frizza presents Zeta Markets' advancements in decentralized trading, focusing on performance, user experience, and the introduction of Bullet for low-latency applications [t=5:44-188:30].
